microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a fully scalable, self-service model used across engineering orgs.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous infrastructure validation at enterprise scale.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, owning technical outcomes end-to-end from discovery through handoff.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring automation workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly mirroring AI-assisted development practices sought in modern solutions engineering roles.
microsoft_2023: Championed **enterprise-ready adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting customer-facing demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through hands-on technical enablement.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical API and integration gaps and delivering actionable feedback directly to Engineering and Product.

Accelerated developer time-to-value by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving retrieval accuracy across internal developer tooling.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, partnering across 140+ teams to drive adoption and unblock enterprise infrastructure expansion.

Ran end-to-end technical discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring the SE motion of owning architecture, discovery, and iterative solution design.

Enabled leadership to surface automation gaps and prioritize high-impact integrations by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, translating raw API and pipeline data into structured, decision-ready product intelligence.

Drove go-to-market readiness for new Azure regions by aligning Engineering, Operations, and Product stakeholders on a shared execution framework, accelerating time-to-value for enterprise customers and reducing launch cycle dependencies across the org.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping all integration dependencies across 1,200+ stations — owning technical outcomes from architecture through handoff in a high-stakes enterprise environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process, demonstrating high agency in unblocking adoption across cross-functional engineering teams.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable integration model that reduced manual intervention across the robotics platform.

Partnered with technical stakeholders to translate complex infrastructure requirements into actionable implementation plans, building structured documentation and proof-of-concept workflows that **accelerated time-to-value** for engineering teams onboarding to the new platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end sales operations and managing the full scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that standardized customer evaluation workflows and improved conversion velocity.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to surface developer-facing and service-oriented value propositions to high-intent customers.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks — demonstrating the structured feedback-to-product-improvement loop central to customer-facing solutions roles.
